pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates the local HTML tool exactly at this path.
export_result.sh explicitly checks for the exported file at this target path.
verifier.py checks that the output file size is strictly greater than 1000 bytes.
export_result.sh validates the SQLite database moz_perms specifically for the 'canvas/extractData' type.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated chart rendered by a local HTML file at /home/ga/Documents/OfflineTools/chart_tool.html. The true extracted base64 canvas data must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/OfflineTools/exported_chart.txt and must be larger than 1000 bytes. The Tor Browser database must record an exception of type 'canvas/extractData'.
